rationale: For a game-specific world builder dashboard, a dark 'command-center' theme with deep obsidian backgrounds and jewel-toned accents (emerald, gold, cyan, arcane purple) provides immersion, reduces eye strain, and mimics the high-end UI found in modern AAA games and modding tools. It leverages the 'Technical' grid aesthetic for precision.

layout.spacing_scale: Tailwind standard with generous padding on containers (p-6, p-8)
layout.grid_system: The 'Control Room' Grid - grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-4 or gap-6 for dense data packing

surface_styles.cards: bg-surface border border-borders-default rounded-lg hover:border-brand-primary/50 transition-colors duration-200
surface_styles.canvas_container: bg-background rounded-xl border border-borders-default overflow-hidden relative shadow-[inset_0_0_100px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)]

buttons.primary: bg-brand-primary text-white font-semibold rounded-md px-6 py-2 hover:bg-brand-primary_hover transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-surface_elevated text-text-primary border border-borders-default hover:bg-white/5 transition-all
buttons.ai_action: bg-brand-accent_ai/10 text-brand-accent_ai border border-brand-accent_ai/30 hover:bg-brand-accent_ai/20 transition-all shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(139,92,246,0.2)]

components.inputs: bg-background border border-borders-default text-text-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-brand-primary focus:border-brand-primary rounded-md px-4 py-2
components.sliders: Accent color mapped to zone type (e.g., green for forest density, cyan for snow)
components.tabs: bg-surface_elevated p-1 rounded-lg. Active tab: bg-brand-primary text-white shadow-sm. Inactive tab: text-text-secondary hover:text-text-primary

interactions.hover: Subtle border color shifts (border-brand-primary/50) and slight transform (-translate-y-0.5) on interactive cards
interactions.focus: Clear ring-1 or ring-2 outlines using brand-primary
interactions.animation: Framer Motion for tab switching, canvas layer fading, and AI chat staggered entrance. Map canvas should have smooth pan/zoom via framer-motion or d3-zoom

hero_background.description: Surreal abstract 3D rendering of a mountain peak. Use as a heavily darkened, low-opacity background for the 'Welcome / Empty State' canvas area.

ai_avatar.description: Glowing runes on dark rocks. Crop to a circle to use as the AI Assistant's avatar in the chat panel.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text-primary against background passes APCA. Use text-muted only for non-critical labels.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid (e.g., data-testid='generate-seed-button', data-testid='biome-painter-tool')

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard HTML + Tailwind for structural layouts like the Sidebar and Grid. Use Shadcn components for specific controls (Tabs, Sliders, Select, Buttons).
Implement the 'Control Room' grid: dense, technical, with clear hierarchy.
The central piece is the 'Interactive Map Canvas'. Use a large div with a grid pattern background (using CSS radial-gradient or SVG pattern) to simulate a map workspace.
Incorporate the AI chat as a collapsible side-panel or floating glassmorphism window over the map canvas.
DO NOT use Inter or Roboto for headings. Use Exo 2 (via Google Fonts).
Always use the provided image URLs. No placeholders.
Apply 'data-testid' to all buttons, tabs, and form inputs for testing.
